'''鈭歷-ch-v''' ('''vachava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turney|turney]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turney|turney]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-ch-v
|-
! Lemma
| vachava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachavithi|vachavithi]] || [[word:vachaviji|vachaviji]] || [[word:vachavishi|vachavishi]] || [[word:vachavi|vachavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachavuthuth|vachavuthuth]] || [[word:vachavujuj|vachavujuj]] || [[word:vachavushush|vachavushush]] || [[word:vachav|vachav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachavuthu|vachavuthu]] || [[word:vachavuju|vachavuju]] || [[word:vachavushu|vachavushu]] || [[word:vachavu|vachavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachavufuth|vachavufuth]] || [[word:vachavufuj|vachavufuj]] || [[word:vachavufush|vachavufush]] || [[word:vachavuf|vachavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachavethe|vachavethe]] || [[word:vachaveje|vachaveje]] || [[word:vachaveshe|vachaveshe]] || [[word:vachave|vachave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachavothoth|vachavothoth]] || [[word:vachavojoj|vachavojoj]] || [[word:vachavoshosh|vachavoshosh]] || [[word:vachav|vachav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachavotho|vachavotho]] || [[word:vachavojo|vachavojo]] || [[word:vachavosho|vachavosho]] || [[word:vachavo|vachavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachavofoth|vachavofoth]] || [[word:vachavofoj|vachavofoj]] || [[word:vachavofosh|vachavofosh]] || [[word:vachavof|vachavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachav忙th忙|vachav忙th忙]] || [[word:vachav忙j忙|vachav忙j忙]] || [[word:vachav忙sh忙|vachav忙sh忙]] || [[word:vachav忙|vachav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachavathath|vachavathath]] || [[word:vachavajaj|vachavajaj]] || [[word:vachavashash|vachavashash]] || [[word:vachav|vachav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachavatha|vachavatha]] || [[word:vachavaja|vachavaja]] || [[word:vachavasha|vachavasha]] || [[word:vachava|vachava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachavafath|vachavafath]] || [[word:vachavafaj|vachavafaj]] || [[word:vachavafash|vachavafash]] || [[word:vachavaf|vachavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vachavasha|vachavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govachavasha|govachavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivachavasha|gokivachavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vachavn眉sha|vachavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govachavnkn眉sha|govachavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivachavn眉sha|gokivachavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vachavsh毛sha|vachavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govachavnksh毛sha|govachavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivachavsh毛sha|gokivachavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachavrosha|vachavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachavnkrosha|govachavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachavrosha|gokivachavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vachavmusha|vachavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govachavnkmusha|govachavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachavmusha|gokivachavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vachavsherasha|vachavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govachavnksherasha|govachavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivachavsherasha|gokivachavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vachavngasha|vachavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govachavnkngasha|govachavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivachavngasha|gokivachavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vachavyasha|vachavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govachavnkyasha|govachavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivachavyasha|gokivachavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vachavyamasha|vachavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govachavnkyamasha|govachavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivachavyamasha|gokivachavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachavn眉sh毛sha|vachavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachavnkn眉sh毛sha|govachavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachavn眉sh毛sha|gokivachavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachavn眉rosha|vachavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachavnkn眉rosha|govachavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachavn眉rosha|gokivachavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachavn眉musha|vachavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachavnkn眉musha|govachavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachavn眉musha|gokivachavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachavsh毛n眉sha|vachavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachavnksh毛n眉sha|govachavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachavsh毛n眉sha|gokivachavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachavsh毛rosha|vachavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachavnksh毛rosha|govachavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachavsh毛rosha|gokivachavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachavsh毛musha|vachavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachavnksh毛musha|govachavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachavsh毛musha|gokivachavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachavron眉sha|vachavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachavnkron眉sha|govachavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachavron眉sha|gokivachavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachavrosh毛sha|vachavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachavnkrosh毛sha|govachavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachavrosh毛sha|gokivachavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachavromusha|vachavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachavnkromusha|govachavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachavromusha|gokivachavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachavmun眉sha|vachavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachavnkmun眉sha|govachavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachavmun眉sha|gokivachavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachavmush毛sha|vachavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachavnkmush毛sha|govachavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachavmush毛sha|gokivachavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachavmurosha|vachavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachavnkmurosha|govachavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachavmurosha|gokivachavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vachav|vachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙ch忙v|v忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovachav|hovachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙ch忙v|hov忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovachav|hohovachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙ch忙v|hohov忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vachav|n眉vachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙ch忙v|n眉v忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vachav|n眉n眉vachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙ch忙v|n眉n眉v忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vachav|n茂vachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙ch忙v|n茂v忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vachav|n茂n茂vachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙ch忙v|n茂n茂v忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvachav|luvachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙ch忙v|luv忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvachav|luluvachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙ch忙v|luluv忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livachav|livachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙ch忙v|liv忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivachav|lilivachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙ch忙v|liliv忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovachav|kovachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙ch忙v|kov忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovachav|kokovachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙ch忙v|kokov忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevachav|kevachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙ch忙v|kev忙ch忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevachav|kekevachav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙ch忙v|kekev忙ch忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
